allow: Bash(sed -i 's|<script src="/assets/js/student-sidebar.js"></script>|<script src="/assets/js/admin-sidebar.js"></script>|g' admin-announcements.html admin-messaging.html admin-notifications.html admin-payments.html admin-profile.html)
Bash(sed -i "s|requireRole\(\\['student'\\]\)|requireRole\(['admin']\)|g" admin-announcements.html admin-messaging.html admin-notifications.html admin-payments.html admin-profile.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<title>Announcements — The Archive</title>|<title>Admin Announcements — The Archive</title>|g' admin-announcements.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<title>Messages — The Archive</title>|<title>Admin Messages — The Archive</title>|g' admin-messaging.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<title>Notifications — The Archive</title>|<title>Admin Notifications — The Archive</title>|g' admin-notifications.html)
